title: Knowledge base: conductor gauge dictated by regulation
notes: KB-DRIVEN DISAMBIGUATION. The customer asks for cable for socket circuits but omits the gauge. The 'Normy i przepisy' space requires ≥2.5 mm² for socket circuits, so the agent must pick KAB-YDYP-3X25 (2.5 mm²) over the near-variant KAB-YDYP-3X15 (1.5 mm²) and cite the standard. Quantity is given explicitly (5 reels = MOQ already met) to isolate the gauge decision from unit-conversion and MOQ noise. The most achievable of the KB cases — tests genuine retrieval + reasoning, not keyword overlap (the article never names a SKU).
request: Poproszę 5 krążków przewodu do obwodów gniazdkowych w warsztacie.
